---
applyTo: "frontend/**"
---

# Frontend Path Instructions

Route frontend work through [../../docs/development/AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md](../../docs/development/AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md), [../../docs/development/CONVENTIONS.md](../../docs/development/CONVENTIONS.md), and [../../docs/testing/TESTING.md](../../docs/testing/TESTING.md).

Check [../../docs/phases/planning-and-progress.md](../../docs/phases/planning-and-progress.md) before editing. Feature-owned work should stay inside the assigned `frontend/src/features/<domain>/**` area unless the lead owns shared routing, store, or API-client changes.

Use focused Vitest/type-check validation for code changes and Playwright evidence for browser-visible behavior when appropriate.
